creator: @sethgolie
transcript: I'm starving, you wanna go to Chick-fil-A? Yeah, I'll get the 12-piece grilled nugget, a side mac and cheese, and then ask for a large bowl so I can mix it together and then put buffalo sauce on top and get a Coke Zero. Okay, that's pretty awesome, but what if we went there for breakfast? Yeah, I'll get the egg white grill with the extra grilled sole, a fruit cup, and a diet lemonade. Man, that's awesome. Where did you even learn all that? Bro, are you not following Seth G yet? I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment FASTFOOD for my FREE fast food cheat sheet. Steal these two Chick-fil-a orders to stay on track. Lunch order: 12 piece Grilled Nuggets + side Mac'n Cheese + buffalo sauce (mix together in bowl) + Coke Zero (495 calories 49G protein). Breakfast order: Egg white grill + extra grilled filet + medium fruit cup + Diet Lemonade (520 calories 66G protein). These will both help you save over 1000 calories & stay on track with your fitness journey!
ocr_summary: Chick-fil-A Lunch: 1830 cal / 62g protein -> 495 cal / 49g protein; Chick-fil-A Breakfast: 1490 cal / 41g protein -> 520 cal / 56g protein (caption says 66g)

swaps.swap_meal: 12 piece Grilled Nuggets + side Mac'n Cheese + buffalo sauce (mixed in bowl) + Coke Zero

swaps.original_meal: Standard Chick-fil-A breakfast (2 chicken biscuits, hash browns, etc.)
swaps.swap_meal: Egg white grill + extra grilled filet + medium fruit cup + Diet Lemonade

parsed.notes: Two Chick-fil-A swaps in one reel (lunch + breakfast). OCR shows 56g protein for breakfast swap but caption says 66g -- caption is likely more accurate. Same creator as positions 12-15.
